message:
fix(test): align test fixture source_path with cached_detail for DetailOpened regression

Fix the app_with_cached_conversation test helper so the selected hit's
source_path matches the cached_detail key. Previously the fixture relied
on the default source_path which could diverge from the cache key,
causing DetailOpened to take the cold-open path instead of the expected
cache-hit path in regression tests.

Also syncs .beads issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
